prompt: Minimalist fashion lookbook collage featuring 8 full-body female models standing against a warm beige studio background. Each model wears elegant, neutral-toned outfits styled in a modern classic aesthetic. Clothing includes silk blouses, cashmere sweaters, linen shirts, knit polos, cardigans, tailored trousers, pleated trousers, wide-leg pants, slim trousers, and an A-line midi skirt. Outerwear includes a houndstooth blazer and a long trench coat. Accessories include structured handbags, tote bags, top-handle bags, belts, wristwatch, and silk scarf. Footwear includes ballet flats, loafers, cap-toe flats, slingback flats, and pumps. Soft lighting, editorial style, clean composition, subtle shadows. Handwritten-style labels pointing to each clothing item. Neutral color palette (cream, beige, black, brown). High detail, fashion magazine aesthetic, 4k resolution.
